lines.speaker: Sawmill Operator
lines.text: Do you want me to make some planks for you? I can make planks from wood, oak, teak and mahogany logs. Or would you like to buy some other housing supplies?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please make me some planks.

lines.speaker: Sawmill operator
lines.text: You'll need to bring me some more logs.

lines.speaker: Sawmill operator
lines.text: Those planks cost [X] coins. You don't have enough money for all of them.

lines.speaker: Sawmill Operator
lines.text: I can make planks from wood, oak, teak and mahogany. I don't make planks from other woods as they're no good for making furniture.

lines.speaker: Sawmill Operator
lines.text: Wood and oak are all over the place, but teak and mahogany can only be found in a few places like Karamja and Etceteria.

lines.speaker: Sawmill Operator
lines.text: Well come back when you want some. You can't get good quality planks anywhere but here!
